paragraphs.title: Rooted in the Andes
paragraphs.text: Our founders Argentine heritage runs deep through the vineyards of Mendoza and the high-altitude terroirs of Gualtallary. Every bottle in our curation carries the soul of the Andes: Intense, complex, and profoundly authentic.

paragraphs.title: The Last Mile Advantage
paragraphs.text: What sets GC Wines apart is exclusive 'Last Mile' access to F&B decision-makers across Asia, the Balkans, and beyond. Our network isn't built on cold outreach; it's forged through years of trust, cultural fluency, and shared dining tables.

paragraphs.title: Four Continents, One Vision
paragraphs.text: From the financial infrastructure of the United States to the Balkan's gateway of Montenegro and the premium markets in Asia, every node in our operation is designed for one purpose: delivering Argentina's finest wines to the world's most discerning palates.
